documents.name: DMS.xlsx
documents.content:
=== Sheet: 目录 ===
序号 | 所属系统 | 英文名称 | 中文名称 | 加工脚本 | 来源系统 | 备注（业务场景设计） | 数据链路
1 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_POLICYINFO | 提取准备金保费数据 | select 
NULL AS STATMONTH ,
A.policy_no as POLICYNO ,
NULL AS ENDORSENO ,
NULL AS CERTITYPE ,
NULL AS COMCODE ,
substr(A.PRODUCT_CODE,1,2) as CLASSCODE ,
A.PRODUCT_CODE RISKCODE ,
NULL AS BUSINESSCODE ,
NULL AS UWCONCLUDE ,
NULL AS ENDORSETYPE ,
NULL AS STARTDATE ,
NULL AS ENDORSEDATE ,
NULL AS ENDDATE ,
0 PREMIUM,
nvl(sum(a.premium), 0) + nvl(sum(a.premium_chg), 0) AS NETPREMIUM  ,
NULL AS ENDORSEDPREM ,
NULL AS ENDORSEDTAXPREM ,
0 AS COMMISSIONAMT ,
nvl(sum(a.COMMISSION), 0) + nvl(sum(a.COMMISSION_CHG), 0) AS COMMISSIONNETAMT ,
TRUNC(SYSDATE-1,'DD') as DATEDAY ,
'ZBJ'DATASOURCES       
          from accept_insurance_list a 
 where greatest(decode(A.policy_no, A.endorse_no, a.eff_date, a.valid_date),
                a.underwrite_date) between
         TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YYYY') and TRUNC(SYSDATE-1,'DD')
 and business_flagcode = '1' 
GROUP BY       substr(A.PRODUCT_CODE,1,2),   A.PRODUCT_CODE,A.policy_no | 准备金/精算系统 | 未到期责任准备金：未到期责任准备金计提数据，以保单为维度记录精算计提基数（承保保费）和准备金金额，是业精/财精核对的关键节点 | 1.3.1 保费链路-精算再保-保费准备金
2 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_CASEINFO | 提取准备金赔款数据 | SELECT
  NULL AS PAYMENTMONTH,
  S.C_PLY_NO AS POLICYNO,
  S.C_CLM_NO AS CLAIMNO,
  S.C_COM_NO AS COMPENSATENO,
  NULL AS COMCODE,
  SUBSTR(S.C_INSRNC_CDE, 1, 2) AS CLASSCODE,
  S.C_INSRNC_CDE RISKCODE,
  NULL AS KINDCODE,
  NULL AS LOSSTYPE,
  NULL AS ACCIDENTDATE,
  NULL AS REGISTERDATE,
  NULL AS ESTIMATEDLOSS,
  NULL AS OUTSTANDINGLOSS,
  nvl(SUM(n_pay_amt),0) AS SETTLEDLOSS,
  NULL AS CLAIMEXPENSE,
  NULL AS RECOVERYAMT,
  NULL AS CLAIMSTATUS,
  TRUNC(SYSDATE -1, 'DD') AS DATEDAY,
  'ZBJ' AS SOURCESYS
FROM
  claims_settlement S
WHERE s.c_clm_stat = '6'
   AND s.t_unwrit_tm BETWEEN
       TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YEAR') and TRUNC(SYSDATE-1, 'DD')+0.99999
   and C_BSNS_ATR = '0'  
GROUP BY
  SUBSTR(S.C_INSRNC_CDE, 1, 2),
  S.C_COM_NO,
  S.C_CLM_NO,
  S.C_INSRNC_CDE,
  S.C_PLY_NO | 准备金/精算系统 | 已决赔款准备金：已决赔款准备金计提数据，以赔案为维度记录精算计提基数（理算赔款）和准备金金额，是业精/财精核对的关键节点 | 
3 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_OUTSTANDINGLOSSES | 提取准备金未决数据 | SELECT 
       A.CLAIM_NO AS CLAIMNO,  -- 立案号
       SUM(RESE_AMOUNT) AS OUTSTANDINGLOSS  -- 未决赔款金额
FROM CLAIMS_SETTLEMENT_LIST A
WHERE A.FLAG = '未决'
GROUP BY A.CLAIM_NO, A.KIND_CODE | 准备金/精算系统 | 未决赔款准备金：未决赔款准备金计提数据，以未决案件为维度记录精算计提基数和准备金金额，是业精/财精核对的关键节点 | 
4 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_ASSUMDE_CEDED_LIST | 准备金分入分出清单数据 | select POLICY_NO
      ,ENDORSE_NO
      ,C_TYPE
      ,sum(N_PRM_OUTTR) as N_PRM_OUTTR 
      ,sum(N_CMM_OUTTR) as N_CMM_OUTTR
      ,sum(N_PRM_INTR) as N_PRM_INTR
      ,sum(N_CMM_INTR)  as N_CMM_INTR
from (
   -- 分出保费
      -- 合约分出保费
      select POLICY_NO
            ,ENDORSE_NO
            ,1 as C_TYPE
            ,N_PRM_OUT as N_PRM_OUTTR
            ,N_CMM_OUT as N_CMM_OUTTR 
            ,0 as N_PRM_INTR
            ,0 as N_CMM_INTR
      from accept_insurance_list A
      where BUSINESS_FLAGCODE ='1' --  1:直接业务 2:分入业务
      and  POLICY_NO in  (select  distinct POLICYNO as  POLICYNO
                          from zbinterf_policy  -- COMMISSION  手续费
                          where reinsmode like '2%' 
                          and reinsmode <> '201'
                          and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
                         )

        UNION ALL  
        -- 临分分出保费
        select POLICY_NO
              ,ENDORSE_NO
              ,1 as C_TYPE 
              ,N_PRM_RE as N_PRM_OUTTR 
              ,N_CMM_RE as N_CMM_OUTTR
              ,0 as N_PRM_INTR
              ,0 as N_CMM_INTR
        from accept_insurance_list A
        where BUSINESS_FLAGCODE ='1' --  1:直接业务 2:分入业务
        and  POLICY_NO in  (select distinct POLICYNO as  POLICYNO
                            from zbinterf_policy
                            where reinsmode like '3%'
                            and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
                           )

        UNION ALL  
    -- 分入保费
       -- 合约分入保费
       select POLICY_NO
             ,ENDORSE_NO
             ,2 as C_TYPE
             ,0 as N_PRM_OUTTR
             ,0 as N_CMM_OUTTR
             ,PREMIUM  as N_PRM_INTR
             ,COMMISSION as N_CMM_INTR
       from accept_insurance_list A
       where BUSINESS_FLAGCODE ='2' --  1:直接业务 2:分入业务
       and  POLICY_NO in  (select distinct POLICYNO as  POLICYNO
                           from ZBInterf_Ceded  -- COMMISSION 手续费
                           where reinsmode like '2%' 
                           and reinsmode <> '201'
                           and TRUNC(accpaydate,'DD')BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-1)
                          )

       UNION ALL 
       -- 临分分入保费
       select  POLICY_NO
              ,ENDORSE_NO
              ,2 as C_TYPE 
              ,0 as N_PRM_OUTTR
              ,0 as N_CMM_OUTTR
              ,PREMIUM as N_PRM_INTR
              ,COMMISSION  as N_CMM_INTR
       from accept_insurance_list A
       where BUSINESS_FLAGCODE ='2' --  1:直接业务 2:分入业务
       and  POLICY_NO in  (select distinct POLICYNO as  POLICYNO
                           from ZBInterf_Ceded
                           where reinsmode like '3%'
                           and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
                          )
  )
  group by  POLICY_NO,ENDORSE_NO,C_TYPE | 准备金/精算系统 | 再保保费准备金：再保分入分出保费的准备金计提清单，记录再保保费对应的准备金数据，是精再核对的关键节点 | 1.3.2 保费链路-精算再保-再保保费准备金
5 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_REINS_RECOVERY_LIST | 准备金摊回赔款信息表 | select C_COM_NO
     , sum(N_PAY_AMT_OUT) as N_PAY_AMT_OUT 
     , sum(N_PAY_COST_OUT) as N_PAY_COST_OUT
from  claims_settlement a
where C_COM_NO in  (
                    -- 合约分出摊回赔款
            select distinct COMPENSATENO
            from zbinterf_paidloss
            where reinsmode like '2%' 
            and reinsmode <> '201'
            and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')

            union 
            -- 临分分出摊回赔款
            select distinct COMPENSATENO
            from zbinterf_paidloss
            where reinsmode like '3%'
            and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
          )
group by C_COM_NO; | 准备金/精算系统 | 再保已决赔款准备金：再保已决赔款摊回的准备金计提数据，记录再保应摊回赔款对应的准备金，是精再核对的关键节点 | 
6 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_SETTLEDLOSS_LIST | 准备金分入已决赔款信息表 | select C_COM_NO
     , sum(N_PAY_AMT) as N_PAY_AMT_INTR
     , sum(N_PAY_COST) as N_PAY_COST_INTR
from  claims_settlement a
where C_COM_NO in  (
            -- 合约分入赔款支出
             select  distinct COMPENSATENO 
             from ZBInterf_CededClaim
             where reinsmode like '2%' 
             and reinsmode <> '201'
             and TRUNC(accpaydate,'DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-1)  

            union 
           --临分分入赔款支出
            select distinct COMPENSATENO
            from ZBInterf_CededClaim
            where reinsmode like '3%'
            and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
          )
group by C_COM_NO | 准备金/精算系统 | 再保已决赔款准备金：再保分入已决赔款的准备金计提数据，记录再保分入已决赔款对应的准备金，是精再核对的关键节点 | 
7 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_AOCLR_OUTSTANDINGLOSSES | 准备金摊回未决数据 | select 
        CLAIM_NO as CLAIMNO
       ,sum(RESE_AMOUNT_OUT) as OSLOSSCNY
       ,sum(RESE_FEE_OUT)  as OSLOSSFEECNY 
from  claims_settlement_list
where  FLAG = '未决'
and CLAIM_NO in  (select distinct  CLAIMNO from  ZBINTERF_OSLOSS
          )       
group by CLAIM_NO | 准备金/精算系统 | 再保未决赔款准备金：再保未决赔款摊回的准备金计提数据，记录再保应摊回未决赔款对应的准备金，是精再核对的关键节点 | 
8 | 收付 | DMS_FI_POLICYINFO | 提取收付保费信息 | select
  NULL AS STATMONTH,
  pc.CERTINO as POLICYNO,
  NULL AS ENDORSENO,
  NULL AS CERTITYPE,
  NULL AS COMCODE,
  substr(pc.riskcode, 1, 2) as CLASSCODE,
  pc.riskcode RISKCODE,
  NULL AS BUSINESSCODE,
  NULL AS UWCONCLUDE,
  NULL AS ENDORSETYPE,
  NULL AS STARTDATE,
  NULL AS ENDORSEDATE,
  NULL AS ENDDATE,
  pc.premium PREMIUM,
  pc.netpremium AS NETPREMIUM,
  NULL AS ENDORSEDPREM,
  NULL AS ENDORSEDTAXPREM,
  cc.paymentfee AS COMMISSIONAMT,
  cc.net_paymentfee AS COMMISSIONNETAMT,
  TRUNC(SYSDATE -1, 'DD') as DATEDAY,
  'SF' DATASOURCES
from
  (
    select
      a.riskcode,
      a.CERTINO,
      sum(a.planfeecny) as netpremium,
      sum(a.planfee * nvl(a.EXCHANGERATE, 1)) premium
    from
      prpjpolicyplan a
    where
      a.certitype in ('P', 'E')
      and a.accountflag = '1'
      and GREATEST(a.ValidDate, a.underwritedate) between TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')
      and TRUNC(SYSDATE -1, 'DD')
    group by
      a.riskcode,
      a.CERTINO
  ) pc
  left join (
    select
      CERTINO,
      sum(a.PlanFeecny) as net_paymentfee,
      sum(a.PlanFee * nvl(a.EXCHANGERATE, 1)) as paymentfee
    from
      PrpJcommPlan a
    where
      a.AccountFlag = '1'
      AND a.riskcode <> 'YAB0'
      AND a.CertiType = 'S'
      AND GREATEST(a.ValidDate, a.underwritedate) between TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')
      and TRUNC(SYSDATE -1, 'DD')
    group by
      CERTINO
  ) cc on pc.CERTINO = cc.CERTINO | 收付/财务系统 | 保费收付：保费资金数据核心，记录客户实收保费、到账流水、应收/实收差额，是业财核对（承保↔收付）、财精/财再核对的中间节点 | 1.2.1 保费链路-财务-保费收付
9 | 收付 | DMS_FI_CASEINFO | 提取收付赔款信息 | SELECT
  NULL AS PAYMENTMONTH,
  A.POLICYNO AS POLICYNO,
  A.CLAIMNO AS CLAIMNO,
  A.COMPENSATENO AS COMPENSATENO,
  NULL AS COMCODE,
  SUBSTR(A.RISKCODE, 1, 2) AS CLASSCODE,
  A.RISKCODE RISKCODE,
  NULL AS KINDCODE,
  NULL AS LOSSTYPE,
  NULL AS ACCIDENTDATE,
  NULL AS REGISTERDATE,
  NULL AS ESTIMATEDLOSS,
  NULL AS OUTSTANDINGLOSS,
  SUM(
    CASE
    WHEN CERTITYPE = 'Z'
    AND LOSSTYPE IN ('01', '03', '04') THEN -1 * A.PLANFEECNY
    ELSE A.PLANFEECNY
    END
  ) AS SETTLEDLOSS,
  NULL AS CLAIMEXPENSE,
  NULL AS RECOVERYAMT,
  NULL AS CLAIMSTATUS,
  TRUNC(SYSDATE -1, 'DD') AS DATEDAY,
  'TJ' AS SOURCESYS
FROM
  PRPJLOSSPLAN A
WHERE
  A.ACCOUNTFLAG = '1'
  AND A.UNDERWRITEDATE BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')
  AND TRUNC(SYSDATE -1, 'DD')
  AND A.CERTITYPE IN ('C', 'D')
  AND A.PAYREFREASON NOT LIKE '_6K'
GROUP BY
  SUBSTR(A.RISKCODE, 1, 2),
  A.COMPENSATENO,
  A.CLAIMNO,
  A.RISKCODE,
  A.POLICYNO | 收付/财务系统 | 赔款收付：赔款资金数据核心，记录对客户实付赔款、打款流水、应付/实付差额，是业财核对（理赔↔收付）、财精/财再核对的中间节点 | 
10 | 收付 | DMS_FI_ASSUMDE_CEDED | 收付分入分出数据 | select   T_CRT_TM
       , T_BGN_TM
       , T_END_TM
       , C_TYPE
       , sum(N_PRM_OUTTR) as N_PRM_OUTTR
       , sum(N_PAY_AMTOUTTR) as N_PAY_AMTOUTTR
       , sum(N_PRM_OUTTM) as N_PRM_OUTTM
       , sum(N_PAY_AMTOUTTM) as N_PAY_AMTOUTTM
       , sum(N_PRM_INTR) as N_PRM_INTR
       , sum(N_PAY_AMTINTR) as N_PAY_AMTINTR
       , sum(N_PRM_INTM) as N_PRM_INTM
       , sum(N_PAY_AMTINTM) as N_PAY_AMTINTM
from 
(
      SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
           , 1 AS C_TYPE
           , SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '01', B.ITEMVALUE)) N_PRM_OUTTR --**合约分出保费
           , SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '11', B.ITEMVALUE)) N_PAY_AMTOUTTR --**合约分出摊回赔款
           , 0 AS N_PRM_OUTTM     -- 临分分出保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTM  -- 临分分出摊回赔款
           , 0 AS N_PRM_INTR      -- 合约分入保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTINTR   -- 合约分入赔款支出
           , 0 AS N_PRM_INTM      -- 临分分入保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTINTM   -- 临分分入赔款支出
      FROM PRPJREINSFEE     A,
           PRPJREINSFEEITEM B
      WHERE A.ACCNO = B.ACCNO
      AND A.PAYACCNO = B.PAYACCNO
      AND A.PAYNO = B.PAYNO
      AND A.OPTTYPE = '0' --分出
      AND A.ACCTYPE = '01' --合约对外
      AND A.ACCKIND <> 'T'
      AND A.ACCPERIOD LIKE '%M'
      AND SUBSTR(A.ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
         
     UNION ALL    
         
      SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
           , 1 AS C_TYPE
           , 0 AS N_PRM_OUTTR --**合约分出保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTR --**合约分出摊回赔款
           , SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '01', B.ITEMVALUE)) AS N_PRM_OUTTM -- 临分分出保费
           , NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '11', B.ITEMVALUE)), 0) + NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '13', B.ITEMVALUE)), 0) AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTM -- 临分分出摊回赔款
           , 0 AS N_PRM_INTR      -- 合约分入保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTINTR   -- 合约分入赔款支出
           , 0 AS N_PRM_INTM      -- 临分分入保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTINTM   -- 临分分入赔款支出
      FROM PRPJREINSFEE     A,
           PRPJREINSFEEITEM B
      WHERE A.ACCNO = B.ACCNO
      AND A.PAYACCNO = B.PAYACCNO
      AND A.PAYNO = B.PAYNO
      AND A.OPTTYPE = '0' --分出
      AND A.ACCTYPE = '10' --临分对外
      AND A.ACCKIND<>'O'
      AND A.ACCPERIOD LIKE '%M'
      AND SUBSTR(A.ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
         
  UNION ALL 
          
      SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
           , 1 AS C_TYPE
           , 0 AS N_PRM_OUTTR --**合约分出保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTR --**合约分出摊回赔款
           , 0 AS N_PRM_OUTTM -- 临分分出保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTM -- 临分分出摊回赔款
           , SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '01', B.ITEMVALUE)) AS N_PRM_INTR --合约分入保费
           , SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '11', B.ITEMVALUE, '13', B.ITEMVALUE)) N_PAY_AMTINTR -- 合约分入赔款支出
           , 0 AS N_PRM_INTM      -- 临分分入保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTINTM   -- 临分分入赔款支出
      FROM PRPJREINSFEE A -- PRPJREINSFEE@HXDBLINK A , 
           ,PRPJREINSFEEITEM B -- PRPJREINSFEEITEM@HXDBLINK B
      WHERE A.ACCNO = B.ACCNO
      AND A.PAYACCNO = B.PAYACCNO
      AND A.PAYNO = B.PAYNO
      AND TRUNC(A.ACCDATE,'DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-1)
      AND ACCTYPE = '11'
      AND (ACCPERIOD LIKE '%Q' OR ACCPERIOD LIKE '%M')
      AND A.VOUCHERNO<> '0'
      AND B.ITEMVALUE != 0
      AND A.OPTTYPE = '1'
        
     UNION ALL         

    --再保系统临分分入 (n_prm_intm, n_pay_amtintm)  --临分分入保费,临分分入赔款支出

      SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
           , 1 AS C_TYPE
           , 0 AS N_PRM_OUTTR --**合约分出保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTR --**合约分出摊回赔款
           , 0 AS N_PRM_OUTTM -- 临分分出保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTM -- 临分分出摊回赔款
           , 0 AS N_PRM_INTR --合约分入保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTINTR -- 合约分入赔款支出
           , SUM(DECODE(ITEMCODE, '01', ITEMVALUE)) N_PRM_INTM --临分分入保费
           , SUM(DECODE(ITEMCODE, '11', ITEMVALUE,'13', ITEMVALUE)) N_PAY_AMTINTM -- 临分分入赔款支出
      FROM FZACC C, 
           FZITEM D
      WHERE C.ACCNO = D.ACCNO
      AND C.ACCTYPE = '10'
      AND C.OPTTYPE = '1'
      AND C.FLAG LIKE '1%'
      AND SUBSTR(C.ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')

)
group by T_CRT_TM
       , T_BGN_TM
       , T_END_TM
       , C_TYPE | 收付/财务系统 | 再保保费收付：再保保费的资金结算数据，记录分入/分出保费的收付流水，是财再核对（财务↔再保保费）的关键节点 | 1.2.2 保费链路-财务-再保保费收付
11 | 收付 | DMS_FI_SETTLEDLOSS_LIST | 收付分入已决赔款信息表 | SELECT
  A.COMPENSATENO AS C_COM_NO,                                      
  SUM(                                                                 
    CASE                                                               
    WHEN CERTITYPE = 'Z'                                               
    AND LOSSTYPE IN ('01', '03', '04') THEN -1 * A.PLANFEECNY          
    ELSE A.PLANFEECNY                                                  
    END                                                                
  ) AS N_PAY_AMT_INTR,                                                    
  NULL AS N_PAY_COST_INTR                                               
FROM PRPJLOSSPLAN A
WHERE A.ACCOUNTFLAG = '1'
  AND A.UNDERWRITEDATE BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')
  AND TRUNC(SYSDATE -1, 'DD')
  AND A.CERTITYPE IN ('C', 'D')
  AND A.PAYREFREASON NOT LIKE '_6K'

13 | 统计 | DMS_CL_CASEINFO | 提取赔款信息 | SELECT

17 | 再保 | DMS_RI_ASSUMDE_CEDED | 再保分入分出数据 | select T_CRT_TM
     , T_BGN_TM
     , T_END_TM
     , C_TYPE
     , sum(N_PRM_OUTTR) as N_PRM_OUTTR
     , sum(N_PAY_AMTOUTTR) as N_PAY_AMTOUTTR
     , sum(N_PRM_OUTTM) as N_PRM_OUTTM
     , sum(N_PAY_AMTOUTTM) as N_PAY_AMTOUTTM
     , sum(N_PRM_INTR) as N_PRM_INTR
     , sum(N_PAY_AMTINTR) as N_PAY_AMTINTR
     , sum(N_PRM_INTM) as N_PRM_INTM
     , sum(N_PAY_AMTINTM) as N_PAY_AMTINTM
from ( 
      SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
           , 2 AS C_TYPE
           , n_prm_outtr
           , n_pay_amtouttr 
           , 0 as n_prm_outtm
           , 0 as n_pay_amtouttm
           , 0 as n_prm_intr
           , 0 as n_pay_amtintr
           , 0 as n_prm_intm
           , 0 as n_pay_amtintm 
      from (select sum(premium) as n_prm_outtr 
            from zbinterf_policy
            where reinsmode like '2%' 
            and reinsmode <> '201'
            and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
           ) a,
           (select nvl(sum(paidloss), 0) + nvl(sum(paidfee), 0) as n_pay_amtouttr 
            from zbinterf_paidloss
            where reinsmode like '2%' 
            and reinsmode <> '201'
            and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
           ) b
          
       UNION ALL         
          
    --再保接口数据 临分分出 (n_prm_outtm, n_pay_amtouttm)

       SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
            , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
            , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
            , 2 AS C_TYPE
            , 0 as n_prm_outtr
            , 0 as n_pay_amtouttr 
            , n_prm_outtm
            , n_pay_amtouttm 
            , 0 as n_prm_intr
            , 0 as n_pay_amtintr
            , 0 as n_prm_intm
            , 0 as n_pay_amtintm 
       from (select sum(premium) as n_prm_outtm 
             from zbinterf_policy
             where reinsmode like '3%'
             and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
            ) a,
            (select nvl(sum(paidloss), 0) + nvl(sum(paidfee), 0) n_pay_amtouttm 
             from zbinterf_paidloss
             where reinsmode like '3%'
             and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
            ) b
               
       UNION ALL         
    --再保接口数据合约分入 (n_prm_intr, n_pay_amtintr)

        SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
             , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
             , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
             , 2 AS C_TYPE
             , 0 as n_prm_outtr
             , 0 as n_pay_amtouttr 
             , 0 as n_prm_outtm
             , 0 as n_pay_amtouttm 
             , n_prm_intr
             , n_pay_amtintr 
             , 0 as n_prm_intm
             , 0 as n_pay_amtintm 
        from (select sum(premium) n_prm_intr 
              from ZBInterf_Ceded
              where reinsmode like '2%' 
              and reinsmode <> '201'
              and TRUNC(accpaydate,'DD')BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-1)
             ) a,
            (select nvl(sum(paidloss), 0) + nvl(sum(paidfee), 0) n_pay_amtintr 
             from ZBInterf_CededClaim
             where reinsmode like '2%' 
             and reinsmode <> '201'
             and TRUNC(accpaydate,'DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-1)
            ) b

        UNION ALL  

    --再保接口数据临分分入 (n_prm_intm, n_pay_amtintm)

        SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
             , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
             , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
             , 2 AS C_TYPE
             , 0 as n_prm_outtr
             , 0 as n_pay_amtouttr 
             , 0 as n_prm_outtm
             , 0 as n_pay_amtouttm 
             , 0 as n_prm_intr
             , 0 as n_pay_amtintr 
             , n_prm_intm
             , n_pay_amtintm 
        from (select sum(premium) n_prm_intm 
              from ZBInterf_Ceded
              where reinsmode like '3%'
              and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
             ) a,
             (select nvl(sum(paidloss), 0) + nvl(sum(paidfee), 0) n_pay_amtintm 
              from ZBInterf_CededClaim
              where reinsmode like '3%'
              and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
             ) b
     ) 
group by T_CRT_TM
       , T_BGN_TM
       , T_END_TM
       , C_TYPE | 再保系统 | 保费分保：再保保费分保核心数据，记录保单分入/分出的保费金额、分保比例、分保对手，是业再/财再核对的关键节点 | 1.3.3 保费链路-精算再保-再保保费分保
18 | 再保 | DMS_RI_ASSUMDE_CEDED_LIST | 再保分入分出清单数据 | select POLICY_NO
      ,ENDORSE_NO
      ,C_TYPE
      ,sum(N_PRM_OUTTR) as N_PRM_OUTTR 
      ,sum(N_CMM_OUTTR) as N_CMM_OUTTR
      ,sum(N_PRM_INTR) as N_PRM_INTR
      ,sum(N_CMM_INTR)  as N_CMM_INTR
from (
     -- 分出保费
         -- 合约分出保费
         select POLICYNO as POLICY_NO
               ,case when ENDORNO is null then POLICYNO else ENDORNO end as ENDORSE_NO
               ,1 as C_TYPE
               ,PREMIUMCNY as N_PRM_OUTTR
               ,COMMISSIONCNY as N_CMM_OUTTR
               ,0 as N_PRM_INTR
               ,0 as N_CMM_INTR
         from zbinterf_policy A -- COMMISSION  手续费
         where reinsmode like '2%' 
         and reinsmode <> '201'
         and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM') 
          
         UNION ALL 
         -- 临分分出保费
         select POLICYNO as POLICY_NO
               ,case when ENDORNO is null then POLICYNO else ENDORNO end as ENDORSE_NO
               ,1 as C_TYPE
               ,PREMIUMCNY as N_PRM_OUTTR
               ,COMMISSIONCNY  as N_CMM_OUTTR
               ,0 as N_PRM_INTR
               ,0 as N_CMM_INTR
         from zbinterf_policy a
         where reinsmode like '3%'
         and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')

         UNION ALL
    -- 分入保费
         -- 合约分入保费
         select POLICYNO as POLICY_NO
               ,case when ENDORNO is null then POLICYNO else ENDORNO end as ENDORSE_NO
               ,2 as C_TYPE 
               ,0 as N_PRM_OUTTR
               ,0 as N_CMM_OUTTR
               ,premiumCNY as N_PRM_INTR
               ,COMMISSIONCNY  as N_CMM_INTR
         from ZBInterf_Ceded  -- COMMISSION 手续费
         where reinsmode like '2%' 
         and reinsmode <> '201'
         and TRUNC(accpaydate,'DD')BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-1)

         UNION ALL 
         -- 临分分入保费
         select POLICYNO as POLICY_NO
               ,case when ENDORNO is null then POLICYNO else  ENDORNO end as ENDORSE_NO
               ,2 as C_TYPE 
               ,0 as N_PRM_OUTTR
               ,0 as N_CMM_OUTTR
               ,premiumCNY as N_PRM_INTR
               ,COMMISSIONCNY   as N_CMM_INTR
         from ZBInterf_Ceded
         where reinsmode like '3%'
         and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
  )group by  POLICY_NO,ENDORSE_NO,C_TYPE | 再保系统 | 保费分保：再保分入分出保费的明细清单，记录分保业务的明细规则和数据，是业再/财再核对的补充明细 | 1.3.4 保费链路-精算再保-再保保费分保明细
19 | 再保 | DMS_RI_REINS_RECOVERY_LIST | 再保摊回赔款信息表 | select C_COM_NO
     , nvl(sum(N_PAY_AMT_OUT),0)  as N_PAY_AMT_OUT 
     , nvl(sum(N_PAY_COST_OUT), 0) as N_PAY_COST_OUT
from (
      -- 合约分出摊回赔款
       select COMPENSATENO as C_COM_NO
            , nvl(PAIDLOSSCNY,0)  as N_PAY_AMT_OUT 
            , nvl(PAIDFEECNY, 0) as N_PAY_COST_OUT
       from zbinterf_paidloss
       where reinsmode like '2%' 
       and reinsmode <> '201'
       and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')

       union all
       -- 临分分出摊回赔款
       select COMPENSATENO as C_COM_NO
            , nvl(PAIDLOSSCNY, 0) N_PAY_AMT_OUT 
            , nvl(PAIDFEECNY, 0) as N_PAY_COST_OUT
       from zbinterf_paidloss
       where reinsmode like '3%'
       and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
   )       
group by C_COM_NO  | 再保系统 | 已决赔款摊回：再保已决赔款摊回的核心数据，记录再保公司应承担的已决赔款金额，是业再/财再核对的关键节点 | 
20 | 再保 | DMS_RI_SETTLEDLOSS_LIST | 再保分入已决赔款信息表 | select C_COM_NO
     , nvl(sum(N_PAY_AMT_INTR),0)  as N_PAY_AMT_INTR 
     , nvl(sum(N_PAY_COST_INTR), 0) as N_PAY_COST_INTR
from (
             -- 合约分入赔款支出
             select  COMPENSATENO as C_COM_NO
                   , (nvl(PAIDLOSSCNY, 0) + nvl(paidfeeCNY, 0)) as N_PAY_AMT_INTR 
                   , nvl(paidfeeCNY, 0) as N_PAY_COST_INTR
             from ZBInterf_CededClaim
             where reinsmode like '2%' 
             and reinsmode <> '201'
             and TRUNC(accpaydate,'DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-1)  


             union all
             --临分分入赔款支出
             select  COMPENSATENO
                   , (nvl(PAIDLOSSCNY, 0) + nvl(paidfeeCNY, 0)) as N_PAY_AMT_INTR
                   , nvl(paidfeeCNY, 0) as N_PAY_COST_INTR 
             from ZBInterf_CededClaim
             where reinsmode like '3%'
             and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
   )       
group by C_COM_NO | 再保系统 | 已决赔款分入：再保分入已决赔款的核心数据，记录分入业务中已决赔款的金额，是业再/财再核对的关键节点 |

segments.content:
=== Sheet: 目录 ===
序号 | 所属系统 | 英文名称 | 中文名称 | 加工脚本 | 来源系统 | 备注（业务场景设计） | 数据链路
1 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_POLICYINFO | 提取准备金保费数据 | select 
NULL AS STATMONTH ,
A.policy_no as POLICYNO ,
NULL AS ENDORSENO ,
NULL AS CERTITYPE ,
NULL AS COMCODE ,
substr(A.PRODUCT_CODE,1,2) as CLASSCODE ,
A.PRODUCT_CODE RISKCODE ,
NULL AS BUSINESSCODE ,
NULL AS UWCONCLUDE ,
NULL AS ENDORSETYPE ,
NULL AS STARTDATE ,
NULL AS ENDORSEDATE ,
NULL AS ENDDATE ,
0 PREMIUM,
nvl(sum(a.premium), 0) + nvl(sum(a.premium_chg), 0) AS NETPREMIUM  ,
NULL AS ENDORSEDPREM ,
NULL AS ENDORSEDTAXPREM ,
0 AS COMMISSIONAMT ,
nvl(sum(a.COMMISSION), 0) + nvl(sum(a.COMMISSION_CHG), 0) AS COMMISSIONNETAMT ,
TRUNC(SYSDATE-1,'DD') as DATEDAY ,
'ZBJ'DATASOURCES       
          from accept_insurance_list a 
 where greatest(decode(A.policy_no, A.endorse_no, a.eff_date, a.valid_date),
                a.underwrite_date) between
         TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YYYY') and TRUNC(SYSDATE-1,'DD')
 and business_flagcode = '1' 
GROUP BY       substr(A.PRODUCT_CODE,1,2),   A.PRODUCT_CODE,A.policy_no | 准备金/精算系统 | 未到期责任准备金：未到期责任准备金计提数据，以保单为维度记录精算计提基数（承保保费）和准备金金额，是业精/财精核对的关键节点 | 1.3.1 保费链路-精算再保-保费准备金
2 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_CASEINFO | 提取准备金赔款数据 | SELECT
  NULL AS PAYMENTMONTH,
  S.C_PLY_NO AS POLICYNO,
  S.C_CLM_NO AS CLAIMNO,
  S.C_COM_NO AS COMPENSATENO,
  NULL AS COMCODE,
  SUBSTR(S.C_INSRNC_CDE, 1, 2) AS CLASSCODE,
  S.C_INSRNC_CDE RISKCODE,
  NULL AS KINDCODE,
  NULL AS LOSSTYPE,
  NULL AS ACCIDENTDATE,
  NULL AS REGISTERDATE,
  NULL AS ESTIMATEDLOSS,
  NULL AS OUTSTANDINGLOSS,
  nvl(SUM(n_pay_amt),0) AS SETTLEDLOSS,
  NULL AS CLAIMEXPENSE,
  NULL AS RECOVERYAMT,
  NULL AS CLAIMSTATUS,
  TRUNC(SYSDATE -1, 'DD') AS DATEDAY,
  'ZBJ' AS SOURCESYS
FROM
  claims_settlement S
WHERE s.c_clm_stat = '6'
   AND s.t_unwrit_tm BETWEEN
       TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YEAR') and TRUNC(SYSDATE-1, 'DD')+0.99999
   and C_BSNS_ATR = '0'  
GROUP BY
  SUBSTR(S.C_INSRNC_CDE, 1, 2),
  S.C_COM_NO,
  S.C_CLM_NO,
  S.C_INSRNC_CDE,
  S.C_PLY_NO | 准备金/精算系统 | 已决赔款准备金：已决赔款准备金计提数据，以赔案为维度记录精算计提基数（理算赔款）和准备金金额，是业精/财精核对的关键节点 | 
3 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_OUTSTANDINGLOSSES | 提取准备金未决数据 | SELECT 
       A.CLAIM_NO AS CLAIMNO,  -- 立案号
       SUM(RESE_AMOUNT) AS OUTSTANDINGLOSS  -- 未决赔款金额
FROM CLAIMS_SETTLEMENT_LIST A
WHERE A.FLAG = '未决'
GROUP BY A.CLAIM_NO, A.KIND_CODE | 准备金/精算系统 | 未决赔款准备金：未决赔款准备金计提数据，以未决案件为维度记录精算计提基数和准备金金额，是业精/财精核对的关键节点 | 
4 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_ASSUMDE_CEDED_LIST | 准备金分入分出清单数据 | select POLICY_NO
      ,ENDORSE_NO
      ,C_TYPE
      ,sum(N_PRM_OUTTR) as N_PRM_OUTTR 
      ,sum(N_CMM_OUTTR) as N_CMM_OUTTR
      ,sum(N_PRM_INTR) as N_PRM_INTR
      ,sum(N_CMM_INTR)  as N_CMM_INTR
from (
   -- 分出保费
      -- 合约分出保费
      select POLICY_NO
            ,ENDORSE_NO
            ,1 as C_TYPE
            ,N_PRM_OUT as N_PRM_OUTTR
            ,N_CMM_OUT as N_CMM_OUTTR 
            ,0 as N_PRM_INTR
            ,0 as N_CMM_INTR
      from accept_insurance_list A
      where BUSINESS_FLAGCODE ='1' --  1:直接业务 2:分入业务
      and  POLICY_NO in  (select  distinct POLICYNO as  POLICYNO
                          from zbinterf_policy  -- COMMISSION  手续费
                          where reinsmode like '2%' 
                          and reinsmode <> '201'
                          and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
                         )

        UNION ALL  
        -- 临分分出保费
        select POLICY_NO
              ,ENDORSE_NO
              ,1 as C_TYPE 
              ,N_PRM_RE as N_PRM_OUTTR 
              ,N_CMM_RE as N_CMM_OUTTR
              ,0 as N_PRM_INTR
              ,0 as N_CMM_INTR
        from accept_insurance_list A
        where BUSINESS_FLAGCODE ='1' --  1:直接业务 2:分入业务
        and  POLICY_NO in  (select distinct POLICYNO as  POLICYNO
                            from zbinterf_policy
                            where reinsmode like '3%'
                            and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
                           )

        UNION ALL  
    -- 分入保费
       -- 合约分入保费
       select POLICY_NO
             ,ENDORSE_NO
             ,2 as C_TYPE
             ,0 as N_PRM_OUTTR
             ,0 as N_CMM_OUTTR
             ,PREMIUM  as N_PRM_INTR
             ,COMMISSION as N_CMM_INTR
       from accept_insurance_list A
       where BUSINESS_FLAGCODE ='2' --  1:直接业务 2:分入业务
       and  POLICY_NO in  (select distinct POLICYNO as  POLICYNO
                           from ZBInterf_Ceded  -- COMMISSION 手续费
                           where reinsmode like '2%' 
                           and reinsmode <> '201'
                           and TRUNC(accpaydate,'DD')BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-1)
                          )

       UNION ALL 
       -- 临分分入保费
       select  POLICY_NO
              ,ENDORSE_NO
              ,2 as C_TYPE 
              ,0 as N_PRM_OUTTR
              ,0 as N_CMM_OUTTR
              ,PREMIUM as N_PRM_INTR
              ,COMMISSION  as N_CMM_INTR
       from accept_insurance_list A
       where BUSINESS_FLAGCODE ='2' --  1:直接业务 2:分入业务
       and  POLICY_NO in  (select distinct POLICYNO as  POLICYNO
                           from ZBInterf_Ceded
                           where reinsmode like '3%'
                           and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
                          )
  )
  group by  POLICY_NO,ENDORSE_NO,C_TYPE | 准备金/精算系统 | 再保保费准备金：再保分入分出保费的准备金计提清单，记录再保保费对应的准备金数据，是精再核对的关键节点 | 1.3.2 保费链路-精算再保-再保保费准备金
5 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_REINS_RECOVERY_LIST | 准备金摊回赔款信息表 | select C_COM_NO
     , sum(N_PAY_AMT_OUT) as N_PAY_AMT_OUT 
     , sum(N_PAY_COST_OUT) as N_PAY_COST_OUT
from  claims_settlement a
where C_COM_NO in  (
                    -- 合约分出摊回赔款
            select distinct COMPENSATENO
            from zbinterf_paidloss
            where reinsmode like '2%' 
            and reinsmode <> '201'
            and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')

            union 
            -- 临分分出摊回赔款
            select distinct COMPENSATENO
            from zbinterf_paidloss
            where reinsmode like '3%'
            and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
          )
group by C_COM_NO; | 准备金/精算系统 | 再保已决赔款准备金：再保已决赔款摊回的准备金计提数据，记录再保应摊回赔款对应的准备金，是精再核对的关键节点 | 
6 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_SETTLEDLOSS_LIST | 准备金分入已决赔款信息表 | select C_COM_NO
     , sum(N_PAY_AMT) as N_PAY_AMT_INTR
     , sum(N_PAY_COST) as N_PAY_COST_INTR
from  claims_settlement a
where C_COM_NO in  (
            -- 合约分入赔款支出
             select  distinct COMPENSATENO 
             from ZBInterf_CededClaim
             where reinsmode like '2%' 
             and reinsmode <> '201'
             and TRUNC(accpaydate,'DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-1)  

            union 
           --临分分入赔款支出
            select distinct COMPENSATENO
            from ZBInterf_CededClaim
            where reinsmode like '3%'
            and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
          )
group by C_COM_NO | 准备金/精算系统 | 再保已决赔款准备金：再保分入已决赔款的准备金计提数据，记录再保分入已决赔款对应的准备金，是精再核对的关键节点 | 
7 | 准备金 | DMS_RS_AOCLR_OUTSTANDINGLOSSES | 准备金摊回未决数据 | select 
        CLAIM_NO as CLAIMNO
       ,sum(RESE_AMOUNT_OUT) as OSLOSSCNY
       ,sum(RESE_FEE_OUT)  as OSLOSSFEECNY 
from  claims_settlement_list
where  FLAG = '未决'
and CLAIM_NO in  (select distinct  CLAIMNO from  ZBINTERF_OSLOSS
          )       
group by CLAIM_NO | 准备金/精算系统 | 再保未决赔款准备金：再保未决赔款摊回的准备金计提数据，记录再保应摊回未决赔款对应的准备金，是精再核对的关键节点 | 
8 | 收付 | DMS_FI_POLICYINFO | 提取收付保费信息 | select
  NULL AS STATMONTH,
  pc.CERTINO as POLICYNO,
  NULL AS ENDORSENO,
  NULL AS CERTITYPE,
  NULL AS COMCODE,
  substr(pc.riskcode, 1, 2) as CLASSCODE,
  pc.riskcode RISKCODE,
  NULL AS BUSINESSCODE,
  NULL AS UWCONCLUDE,
  NULL AS ENDORSETYPE,
  NULL AS STARTDATE,
  NULL AS ENDORSEDATE,
  NULL AS ENDDATE,
  pc.premium PREMIUM,
  pc.netpremium AS NETPREMIUM,
  NULL AS ENDORSEDPREM,
  NULL AS ENDORSEDTAXPREM,
  cc.paymentfee AS COMMISSIONAMT,
  cc.net_paymentfee AS COMMISSIONNETAMT,
  TRUNC(SYSDATE -1, 'DD') as DATEDAY,
  'SF' DATASOURCES
from
  (
    select
      a.riskcode,
      a.CERTINO,
      sum(a.planfeecny) as netpremium,
      sum(a.planfee * nvl(a.EXCHANGERATE, 1)) premium
    from
      prpjpolicyplan a
    where
      a.certitype in ('P', 'E')
      and a.accountflag = '1'
      and GREATEST(a.ValidDate, a.underwritedate) between TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')
      and TRUNC(SYSDATE -1, 'DD')
    group by
      a.riskcode,
      a.CERTINO
  ) pc
  left join (
    select
      CERTINO,
      sum(a.PlanFeecny) as net_paymentfee,
      sum(a.PlanFee * nvl(a.EXCHANGERATE, 1)) as paymentfee
    from
      PrpJcommPlan a
    where
      a.AccountFlag = '1'
      AND a.riskcode <> 'YAB0'
      AND a.CertiType = 'S'
      AND GREATEST(a.ValidDate, a.underwritedate) between TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')
      and TRUNC(SYSDATE -1, 'DD')
    group by
      CERTINO
  ) cc on pc.CERTINO = cc.CERTINO | 收付/财务系统 | 保费收付：保费资金数据核心，记录客户实收保费、到账流水、应收/实收差额，是业财核对（承保↔收付）、财精/财再核对的中间节点 | 1.2.1 保费链路-财务-保费收付
9 | 收付 | DMS_FI_CASEINFO | 提取收付赔款信息 | SELECT
  NULL AS PAYMENTMONTH,
  A.POLICYNO AS POLICYNO,
  A.CLAIMNO AS CLAIMNO,
  A.COMPENSATENO AS COMPENSATENO,
  NULL AS COMCODE,
  SUBSTR(A.RISKCODE, 1, 2) AS CLASSCODE,
  A.RISKCODE RISKCODE,
  NULL AS KINDCODE,
  NULL AS LOSSTYPE,
  NULL AS ACCIDENTDATE,
  NULL AS REGISTERDATE,
  NULL AS ESTIMATEDLOSS,
  NULL AS OUTSTANDINGLOSS,
  SUM(
    CASE
    WHEN CERTITYPE = 'Z'
    AND LOSSTYPE IN ('01', '03', '04') THEN -1 * A.PLANFEECNY
    ELSE A.PLANFEECNY
    END
  ) AS SETTLEDLOSS,
  NULL AS CLAIMEXPENSE,
  NULL AS RECOVERYAMT,
  NULL AS CLAIMSTATUS,
  TRUNC(SYSDATE -1, 'DD') AS DATEDAY,
  'TJ' AS SOURCESYS
FROM
  PRPJLOSSPLAN A
WHERE
  A.ACCOUNTFLAG = '1'
  AND A.UNDERWRITEDATE BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')
  AND TRUNC(SYSDATE -1, 'DD')
  AND A.CERTITYPE IN ('C', 'D')
  AND A.PAYREFREASON NOT LIKE '_6K'
GROUP BY
  SUBSTR(A.RISKCODE, 1, 2),
  A.COMPENSATENO,
  A.CLAIMNO,
  A.RISKCODE,
  A.POLICYNO | 收付/财务系统 | 赔款收付：赔款资金数据核心，记录对客户实付赔款、打款流水、应付/实付差额，是业财核对（理赔↔收付）、财精/财再核对的中间节点 | 
10 | 收付 | DMS_FI_ASSUMDE_CEDED | 收付分入分出数据 | select   T_CRT_TM
       , T_BGN_TM
       , T_END_TM
       , C_TYPE
       , sum(N_PRM_OUTTR) as N_PRM_OUTTR
       , sum(N_PAY_AMTOUTTR) as N_PAY_AMTOUTTR
       , sum(N_PRM_OUTTM) as N_PRM_OUTTM
       , sum(N_PAY_AMTOUTTM) as N_PAY_AMTOUTTM
       , sum(N_PRM_INTR) as N_PRM_INTR
       , sum(N_PAY_AMTINTR) as N_PAY_AMTINTR
       , sum(N_PRM_INTM) as N_PRM_INTM
       , sum(N_PAY_AMTINTM) as N_PAY_AMTINTM
from 
(
      SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
           , 1 AS C_TYPE
           , SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '01', B.ITEMVALUE)) N_PRM_OUTTR --**合约分出保费
           , SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '11', B.ITEMVALUE)) N_PAY_AMTOUTTR --**合约分出摊回赔款
           , 0 AS N_PRM_OUTTM     -- 临分分出保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTM  -- 临分分出摊回赔款
           , 0 AS N_PRM_INTR      -- 合约分入保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTINTR   -- 合约分入赔款支出
           , 0 AS N_PRM_INTM      -- 临分分入保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTINTM   -- 临分分入赔款支出
      FROM PRPJREINSFEE     A,
           PRPJREINSFEEITEM B
      WHERE A.ACCNO = B.ACCNO
      AND A.PAYACCNO = B.PAYACCNO
      AND A.PAYNO = B.PAYNO
      AND A.OPTTYPE = '0' --分出
      AND A.ACCTYPE = '01' --合约对外
      AND A.ACCKIND <> 'T'
      AND A.ACCPERIOD LIKE '%M'
      AND SUBSTR(A.ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
         
     UNION ALL    
         
      SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
           , 1 AS C_TYPE
           , 0 AS N_PRM_OUTTR --**合约分出保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTR --**合约分出摊回赔款
           , SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '01', B.ITEMVALUE)) AS N_PRM_OUTTM -- 临分分出保费
           , NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '11', B.ITEMVALUE)), 0) + NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '13', B.ITEMVALUE)), 0) AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTM -- 临分分出摊回赔款
           , 0 AS N_PRM_INTR      -- 合约分入保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTINTR   -- 合约分入赔款支出
           , 0 AS N_PRM_INTM      -- 临分分入保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTINTM   -- 临分分入赔款支出
      FROM PRPJREINSFEE     A,
           PRPJREINSFEEITEM B
      WHERE A.ACCNO = B.ACCNO
      AND A.PAYACCNO = B.PAYACCNO
      AND A.PAYNO = B.PAYNO
      AND A.OPTTYPE = '0' --分出
      AND A.ACCTYPE = '10' --临分对外
      AND A.ACCKIND<>'O'
      AND A.ACCPERIOD LIKE '%M'
      AND SUBSTR(A.ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
         
  UNION ALL 
          
      SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
           , 1 AS C_TYPE
           , 0 AS N_PRM_OUTTR --**合约分出保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTR --**合约分出摊回赔款
           , 0 AS N_PRM_OUTTM -- 临分分出保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTM -- 临分分出摊回赔款
           , SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '01', B.ITEMVALUE)) AS N_PRM_INTR --合约分入保费
           , SUM(DECODE(B.ITEMCODE, '11', B.ITEMVALUE, '13', B.ITEMVALUE)) N_PAY_AMTINTR -- 合约分入赔款支出
           , 0 AS N_PRM_INTM      -- 临分分入保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTINTM   -- 临分分入赔款支出
      FROM PRPJREINSFEE A -- PRPJREINSFEE@HXDBLINK A , 
           ,PRPJREINSFEEITEM B -- PRPJREINSFEEITEM@HXDBLINK B
      WHERE A.ACCNO = B.ACCNO
      AND A.PAYACCNO = B.PAYACCNO
      AND A.PAYNO = B.PAYNO
      AND TRUNC(A.ACCDATE,'DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-1)
      AND ACCTYPE = '11'
      AND (ACCPERIOD LIKE '%Q' OR ACCPERIOD LIKE '%M')
      AND A.VOUCHERNO<> '0'
      AND B.ITEMVALUE != 0
      AND A.OPTTYPE = '1'
        
     UNION ALL         

    --再保系统临分分入 (n_prm_intm, n_pay_amtintm)  --临分分入保费,临分分入赔款支出

      SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
           , 1 AS C_TYPE
           , 0 AS N_PRM_OUTTR --**合约分出保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTR --**合约分出摊回赔款
           , 0 AS N_PRM_OUTTM -- 临分分出保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTOUTTM -- 临分分出摊回赔款
           , 0 AS N_PRM_INTR --合约分入保费
           , 0 AS N_PAY_AMTINTR -- 合约分入赔款支出
           , SUM(DECODE(ITEMCODE, '01', ITEMVALUE)) N_PRM_INTM --临分分入保费
           , SUM(DECODE(ITEMCODE, '11', ITEMVALUE,'13', ITEMVALUE)) N_PAY_AMTINTM -- 临分分入赔款支出
      FROM FZACC C, 
           FZITEM D
      WHERE C.ACCNO = D.ACCNO
      AND C.ACCTYPE = '10'
      AND C.OPTTYPE = '1'
      AND C.FLAG LIKE '1%'
      AND SUBSTR(C.ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')

)
group by T_CRT_TM
       , T_BGN_TM
       , T_END_TM
       , C_TYPE | 收付/财务系统 | 再保保费收付：再保保费的资金结算数据，记录分入/分出保费的收付流水，是财再核对（财务↔再保保费）的关键节点 | 1.2.2 保费链路-财务-再保保费收付
11 | 收付 | DMS_FI_SETTLEDLOSS_LIST | 收付分入已决赔款信息表 | SELECT

    CASE                                                               
    WHEN CERTITYPE = 'Z'

NULL AS STATMONTH ,

13 | 统计 | DMS_CL_CASEINFO | 提取赔款信息 | SELECT

17 | 再保 | DMS_RI_ASSUMDE_CEDED | 再保分入分出数据 | select T_CRT_TM
     , T_BGN_TM
     , T_END_TM
     , C_TYPE
     , sum(N_PRM_OUTTR) as N_PRM_OUTTR
     , sum(N_PAY_AMTOUTTR) as N_PAY_AMTOUTTR
     , sum(N_PRM_OUTTM) as N_PRM_OUTTM
     , sum(N_PAY_AMTOUTTM) as N_PAY_AMTOUTTM
     , sum(N_PRM_INTR) as N_PRM_INTR
     , sum(N_PAY_AMTINTR) as N_PAY_AMTINTR
     , sum(N_PRM_INTM) as N_PRM_INTM
     , sum(N_PAY_AMTINTM) as N_PAY_AMTINTM
from ( 
      SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
           , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
           , 2 AS C_TYPE
           , n_prm_outtr
           , n_pay_amtouttr 
           , 0 as n_prm_outtm
           , 0 as n_pay_amtouttm
           , 0 as n_prm_intr
           , 0 as n_pay_amtintr
           , 0 as n_prm_intm
           , 0 as n_pay_amtintm 
      from (select sum(premium) as n_prm_outtr 
            from zbinterf_policy
            where reinsmode like '2%' 
            and reinsmode <> '201'
            and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
           ) a,
           (select nvl(sum(paidloss), 0) + nvl(sum(paidfee), 0) as n_pay_amtouttr 
            from zbinterf_paidloss
            where reinsmode like '2%' 
            and reinsmode <> '201'
            and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
           ) b
          
       UNION ALL         
          
    --再保接口数据 临分分出 (n_prm_outtm, n_pay_amtouttm)

       SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
            , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
            , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
            , 2 AS C_TYPE
            , 0 as n_prm_outtr
            , 0 as n_pay_amtouttr 
            , n_prm_outtm
            , n_pay_amtouttm 
            , 0 as n_prm_intr
            , 0 as n_pay_amtintr
            , 0 as n_prm_intm
            , 0 as n_pay_amtintm 
       from (select sum(premium) as n_prm_outtm 
             from zbinterf_policy
             where reinsmode like '3%'
             and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
            ) a,
            (select nvl(sum(paidloss), 0) + nvl(sum(paidfee), 0) n_pay_amtouttm 
             from zbinterf_paidloss
             where reinsmode like '3%'
             and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
            ) b
               
       UNION ALL         
    --再保接口数据合约分入 (n_prm_intr, n_pay_amtintr)

        SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
             , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
             , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
             , 2 AS C_TYPE
             , 0 as n_prm_outtr
             , 0 as n_pay_amtouttr 
             , 0 as n_prm_outtm
             , 0 as n_pay_amtouttm 
             , n_prm_intr
             , n_pay_amtintr 
             , 0 as n_prm_intm
             , 0 as n_pay_amtintm 
        from (select sum(premium) n_prm_intr 
              from ZBInterf_Ceded
              where reinsmode like '2%' 
              and reinsmode <> '201'
              and TRUNC(accpaydate,'DD')BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-1)
             ) a,
            (select nvl(sum(paidloss), 0) + nvl(sum(paidfee), 0) n_pay_amtintr 
             from ZBInterf_CededClaim
             where reinsmode like '2%' 
             and reinsmode <> '201'
             and TRUNC(accpaydate,'DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE-1)
            ) b

        UNION ALL  

    --再保接口数据临分分入 (n_prm_intm, n_pay_amtintm)

        SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS T_CRT_TM
             , TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR') AS T_BGN_TM
             , TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AS T_END_TM
             , 2 AS C_TYPE
             , 0 as n_prm_outtr
             , 0 as n_pay_amtouttr 
             , 0 as n_prm_outtm
             , 0 as n_pay_amtouttm 
             , 0 as n_prm_intr
             , 0 as n_pay_amtintr 
             , n_prm_intm
             , n_pay_amtintm 
        from (select sum(premium) n_prm_intm 
              from ZBInterf_Ceded
              where reinsmode like '3%'
              and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
             ) a,
             (select nvl(sum(paidloss), 0) + nvl(sum(paidfee), 0) n_pay_amtintm 
              from ZBInterf_CededClaim
              where reinsmode like '3%'
              and SUBSTR(ACCPERIOD,1,7) BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YEAR'),'YYYY-MM') AND TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE-1),'YYYY-MM')
             ) b
     ) 
group by T_CRT_TM
       , T_BGN_TM
       , T_END_TM

英大财险-数据共享中心-业财再精核对方案

                             2026年05月

一、背景与目标

当前，公司已建成以数据共享中心为核心的统一数据中心，实现了收付系统、承保系统、理赔系统、再保系统、精算准备金系统等多源数据的集中采集与存储。但在实际运营中，各系统间仍存在数据口径不一、流转缺失、金额偏差等问题，直接影响财务报告的真实性、新保险合同准则（IFRS 17/中国新准则）基础数据的合规性，以及公司整体经营风险的管控。

为进一步夯实数据底座，数科部-数据处组织开展了业务数据（承保、理赔）、财务数据（收付）、再保数据、精算准备金数据的四方交叉核对工作。核心思路是：以财务收付数据为中心纽带，与承保、理赔业务源头核对（业财核对），与准备金基础数据核对（财精核对），与再保账期结算数据核对（财再核对），并由共享中心牵头打通准备金与业务、再保之间的核对（业精核对、精再核对），形成覆盖全价值链的跨系统数据一致性验证闭环。

目标：

1. 保证财务数据真实完整：确保收付系统记录的保费、赔款、手续费等于业务源头和准备金计量一致。

2. 夯实新准则数据基础：验证计量模型输入数据（保费、赔款、费用、分保等）在系统间流转无偏差，满足IFRS 17最细颗粒度、合同组及保单维度合规要求。

3. 降低数据问题导致的财务错报、准备金偏差和再保结算风险，实现数据异常的快速定位、责任界定和修复。

二、设计思路

整体设计遵循“统一接入、规则配置、自动校验、报告闭环”的原则，借助数据共享中心现有平台能力进行扩展。

1. 统一数据接入与标准化  

   各业务系统（承保、理赔、再保）及财务收付、准备金系统的原始数据，通过批量/T+1方式汇入数据共享中心。在原有数仓（操作数据存储层）之上，新增DMS（Data Matching Store，数据核对存储层），专门承载跨系统校验所需的标准化数据。按域进行模型分区，统一数据结构、字段命名及码值映射，消除异构系统差异。

2. 规则驱动自动化校验  

   在数据共享中心的质量管理模块中，可视化配置核对规则。每条规则定义数据源、关联键、比对字段及容差阈值，后台自动解析为可执行的SQL/比对任务，并调度执行。支持按日、按月等频次运行。

3. 质量报告与闭环管理  

   每次校验完成后，自动生成多维质量报告，包含整体通过率、按核对类型/系统的明细、差异记录详情。报告通过数据共享中心运维人员分析后，发送至各系统运维负责人进行整改，实现“发现-通知-修复-复验”闭环。

4. 分层分域治理  

   根据核对对象和时效性要求，将规则划分为日频度保单级/立案级/计算书级的实时一致性校验，以及月频度账单期/合同组级的批量校验，既保障日常监控，又满足月结与准则计量需求。

三、详细设计方案

1. 数据接入规范

在数据共享中心分层体系内，新增DMS层，用于存储跨系统校验的轻度汇总及明细基准数据，保障校验过程隔离、高效且可追溯。

数据域划分及缩写：

  承保域（Policy & Endorsement）：PL

  理赔域（Claim）：CL

  收付域（Financial & Payment）：FI

  准备金域（Reserve）：RS

  再保域（Reinsurance）：RI

  新保险合同准则（IFRS 17）IF

接入内容：  

    从各源系统的ODS明细表中，按校验所需字段抽取数据，生成DMS标准表。例如：

  DMS_ PL保单信息表（含不含税保费、不含税手续费、保批单号等）

  DMS_CL_理算信息表、DMS_CL_未决信息表

  DMS_FI_收付信息表（入账类型、单据号、金额、保批单号、计算书号等）

  DMS_RS_保批单信息表、DMS_RS_理赔清单表

  DMS_RI_再保分出信息表、DMS_RI_再保摊回赔款信息表等

接入频次： 日频数据每日T+1抽取；月频数据在每月关账后统一抽取，确保与财务月结周期一致。

数据质量基础清洗： 统一空值处理、金额符号（C/D）、日期格式、组织编码映射，确保比对基准一致。

2. 规则规范

核对规则采用结构化描述，确保开发、维护、沟通的统一性。

规则要素模板：

核对类型：业财核对 、财精核对、业精核对、财再核对、精再核对

涉及系统：如实填写（如：数据共享中心与收付系统、准备金系统与收付系统）

数据负责人：业务域IT负责人

规则简述：一句话说明核对目标

规则校验：具体校验逻辑，必须遵循以下规范：

  系统域名：承保域、理赔域、收付域、准备金、再保域

  表名：使用 【表名】 限定

  字段名：使用 <字段名> 限定

  码值/枚举：使用 “码值” 限定

检核类型：跨系统数据一致性校验

检核频度：日 / 月

示例：  

同一保单下，保单域【保单信息表】中的<不含税保费>与收付域【收付信息表】中入账类型为“保费收入”的<不含税保费>合计一致。  

（金额容差可配置，如1.00元）

3. 质量报告设计

质量报告通过BI看板呈现如下核心指标：

1. 总体指标卡片

2. 按核对类型统计

   业财核对、财精核对等各类别的通过率、差异数、趋势图

3. 各系统检核明细表

4. 差异下钻与闭环

   点击差异记录可跳转至明细数据，展示两边系统具体字段值。

四、规则统计展示（基于附件规则）

规则明细：

通过上述30条规则的持续运行，将实现对保单级、计算书级、账单期级三个颗粒度的全面监控，有效消除收付、承保、理赔、准备金、再保之间的数据壁垒，确保四方数据真实、完整、一致。

五、下一步工作与保障机制

1. 规则研发与测试： 由数据共享IT牵头，各域数据负责人配合，在两周内完成30条规则的SQL模板开发与历史数据验证。

2. 报告上线试运行： 上线质量看板，先并行运行1个月，设置差异告警阈值。

3. 整改闭环流程： 与各部门明确数据差异的修复时效、复验机制，纳入月度数据质量考核。

4. 长期扩展： 后续可根据新准则分摊后数据、费用率等维度，进一步扩充核对规则，实现更细颗粒度的业财精融合验证。

1. 按核对类型统计 | 1. 按核对类型统计 | 1. 按核对类型统计

核对类型 | 规则数量 | 占比

财精核对 | 9 | 30.00%

业财核对 | 7 | 23.33%

精再核对 | 6 | 20.00%

财再核对 | 5 | 16.67%

业精核对 | 3 | 10.00%

2. 按检核频度统计 | 2. 按检核频度统计 | 2. 按检核频度统计

核对类型 | 规则数量 | 占比

日 | 19 | 63.33%

月 | 11 | 36.67%

3. 按涉及系统覆盖统计 | 3. 按涉及系统覆盖统计 | 3. 按涉及系统覆盖统计

涉及系统 | 规则覆盖数量 | 占比

收付系统 | 21 | 22.83%

数据共享中心 | 30 | 32.61%

再保系统 | 11 | 11.96%

承保系统 | 7 | 7.61%

准备金系统 | 18 | 19.57%

理赔系统 | 5 | 5.43%

共享中心获取的收付数据与共享中心获取的承保数据、再保数据、理赔数据核对，通过共享中心进行跨系统数据一致性验证，确保财务数据的真实性、新准则基础数据的合规性，并且降低数据问题导致的风险。 |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
序号 | 核对类型 | 涉及系统 | 数据负责人 | 规则描述 | 规则校验 | 检核类型 | 检核频度 | 
1 | 业财核对 | 数据共享中心与收付系统 | 数据共享IT、承保系统数据负责人、收付系统数据负责人 | 承保系统记录的签单保单保费金额与收付系统累计实际到账保费金额是否一致 | 同一保单下，承保域【保单信息表】中的<不含税保费>与收付域【收付信息表】中入账类型为<保费收入>的<不含税保费>合计一致 | 跨系统数据一致性校验 | 日 |   select a.POLICYNO ,a.NETPREMIUM AS NETPREMIUM ,b.NETPREMIUM AS SF  from DMS_PL_POLICYINFO a  inner join DMS_FI_POLICYINFO b  on a.POLICYno = b.POLICYNO where abs(a.NETPREMIUM-b.NETPREMIUM) >1 and not exists (   select '1' from DMS_LLC_USE_PREMIUM_DIF_POLICY c where a.POLICYNO=c.ENDORSENOPOLICYNO )

3 |  |  |  | 收付系统接收到的保单与承保系统记录的保单是否一致 | 收付域【收付信息表】中的保批单是否在承保域【保单信息表】中存在 | 跨系统数据一致性校验 | 日 | select a.POLICYNO   from DMS_FI_POLICYINFO  a  left  join DMS_PL_POLICYINFO b  on a.POLICYno = b.POLICYNO where b.POLICYNO is null  and a.NETPREMIUM <>0 and not exists (   select '1' from DMS_LLC_USE_PREMIUM_DIF_POLICY c where a.POLICYNO=c.ENDORSENOPOLICYNO )
4 |  |  |  | 承保系统记录的手续费金额与收付系统累计实际支付手续费金额是否一致 | 同一保单下，承保域【保单信息表】中的<不含税手续费>与收付域【收付信息表】中入账类型为<手续费支出>的<不含税手续费>合计一致 | 跨系统数据一致性校验 | 日 |
